utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final plan: health_coverage is present, property_coverage is present, travel_coverage is present, additional_services is present, total_budget is present. Now check if fully specified with costs: health_coverage includes total_monthly_cost (€985) but lacks detailed cost breakdowns per coverage elements; still has a cost. property_coverage only says 'Included in family network plan' with no costs, so not fully specified. travel_coverage lists coverages but no costs, so not fully specified. additional_services lists services with one reimbursement amount (€2,400) but not their costs; partial. total_budget includes monthly_insurance_cost (€985) but no annual cost breakdown; partial but has some costs. According to the instruction, items must be fully specified with all details and costs. Only health_coverage and total_budget include some costs, but total_budget requires complete monthly/annual breakdown; it's missing annual cost. Thus only health_coverage can be considered specified with costs, though minimal. The rest lack required costs/details.
